Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-27198 in TeamCity. The vulnerability allows an attacker to bypass authentication to create a new TeamCity user with administrator permissions or access token for a user. This can be used to remotely execute commands.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of vulnerability {detect} in TeamCity. The user with ID {subject.account.id} and administrator permissions is created on host {event_src.host}.
Exploitation of vulnerability {detect} in TeamCity. Access token {object.value} is created for the user with ID {subject.account.id} on host {event_src.host}.
Possible exploitation of vulnerability {detect} in TeamCity. Commands are executed on behalf of the TeamCity user with ID {subject.account.id} on host {event_src.host}.
